meaning: adj.[动]尿囊的,尿囊内的,有尿囊的
examples: The PH value of amniotic and allantoic fluid supplemented each other to some degree.
Allantoic fluid of chicken embryo that had been inoculated with one strain of renal type IBV was used to challenge 16-day-old chicken.
SOD and MDA concentration in egg yolk, egg white, chick embryo allantoic liquid and chick embryo amnionic fluid have been determined in this study.
